# README

This file should be included on the top level of each architecture:
* If is multi-arch, after packaging the buildpack, the `README.md` file should be on each architecure `./linux/amd64/README.md`, `./linux/arm64/README.md`, `etc.`
* If is single arch, after packaging the buildpack, the `README.md` file  should be on the top level `./README.md`
